message:
Redesign PR comment with kbd status and shields.io type badges

- Use <kbd>✓ added</kbd> / <kbd>✓ exists</kbd> for status (secondary style)
- Use shields.io badges for type with colors:
  - feature: green (#238636)
  - bugfix: orange (#d97706)
  - breaking: red (#dc2626)
  - change: purple (#6366f1)
- Clean header with 📋 emoji
- Simplified date display (date only, no timestamp)
- Consistent middot separators in metadata line

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch: @@ -18,28 +18,35 @@ authors=$(echo "$frontmatter" | awk '/^authors:/{f=1;next} f&&/^[^ ]/{exit} f' | # Extract body (everything after second ---) body=$(awk '/^---$/{if(++n==2){getline;found=1}}found' "$ENTRY_FILE") -# Build comment based on mode +# Map type to badge color +case "$type" in + feature) badge_color="238636" ;; + bugfix) badge_color="d97706" ;; + breaking) badge_color="dc2626" ;; + change) badge_color="6366f1" ;; + *) badge_color="6b7280" ;; +esac + +# Build status badge based on mode if [ "$MODE" = "existing" ]; then - callout_type="NOTE" - callout_msg="Found an existing changelog entry for this PR." + status_badge="✓ exists" else - callout_type="TIP" - callout_msg="@${PR_AUTHOR} Added a changelog entry for this PR." + status_badge="✓ added" fi +# Extract just the date part from ISO timestamp +created_date=${created%%T*} + cat >/tmp/pr-comment.md < [!${callout_type}] -> ${callout_msg} -### 📝 ${title} +## 📋 Changelog Entry  ${status_badge} + +**${title}** -| | | -|:--|:--| -| 🏷️ Type | \`${type}\` | -| 🔗 PR | #${pr:-$PR_NUMBER} | -| 👥 Authors | ${authors} | -| 📅 Created | ${created} | + · #${pr:-$PR_NUMBER} · ${authors} · ${created_date} + +--- ${body}
